reason: Verify service boundaries, imports, and native-process usage.
Check non-Git, timeout, malformed output, and remote endpoint failure behavior.
Verify context-isolated API shapes and no renderer Node access.
Check renderer alias coalescing, state consistency, and performance.
Check reuse, explicit types, no duplication, and focused changes.
Verify end-to-end local and remote data flow across every session source.
Validate implementation against Git semantics and edge cases.
